---
title: "Practice"
date: 2026-05-07
categories: [practice]
draft: false
---

## Practice

Practice pages collect reusable workflows, SOPs, package notes, and hands-on decisions.

They are for "how I do this", while concept pages are for "what this means" and literature pages are for "where the evidence came from".

## Index

| Area | Page | Added |
|---|---|---|
| Single-cell | [Single-Cell Practice](single-cell/index.qmd) | 2026-05-07 |
